summary: Comprehensive testing of SignalBeast Pro key improvements completed. All major features working correctly with live data integration and signal diversity fixes successfully implemented.

flaky_endpoints.issue: CoinGecko API returning 429 Too Many Requests
flaky_endpoints.impact: Crypto data not loading in frontend
flaky_endpoints.note: External API rate limiting issue, not code issue

passed_tests: Live Forex data with correct price ranges (EUR/USD ~1.15, GBP/USD ~1.33, USD/JPY ~159)
Live Indian market data with 15+ indices and 29+ stocks
Signal generation diversity (confidence: 66%-93%, grades: B to A+)
Markets page UI with proper tab navigation
Indian market data grouped into Indices and Stocks sections
Live indicators showing on Forex and Indian tabs
Dashboard loading with live market data and diverse signals
Signals page UI with market/asset/timeframe selection
Beast AI chat interface loading correctly

success_percentage.backend: 95% (18/19 tests passed - only CoinGecko rate limiting issue)
